company: Bangkit Academy led by Google, Tokopedia, Gojek, & Traveloka
description: Completed an intensive, industry-led program focused on Mobile Development, covering Android fundamentals using Kotlin.

Gained hands-on experience in version control (Git), agile workflow, and professional communication in a team environment.
Selected as a Bangkit Academy graduate with strong fundamentals in building scalable and maintainable mobile applications.

Implemented Clean Architecture with MVVM pattern to ensure scalability, maintainability, and clear separation of concerns.
Contributed to building efficient, structured, and high-quality mobile applications.
Developed native mobile applications using Kotlin with modern asynchronous programming approaches.
Utilized Kotlin Flow, StateFlow, and SharedFlow to improve performance through asynchronous and non-blocking data handling.
Applied internal Clean Code architecture standards to ensure maintainable, scalable, and high-quality codebase.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver robust and user-friendly applications.
